reference_notes: Адаптация carousel/trash-design референсов: рваная бумага, скотч, стикеры, розовый маркер, «скрины», мем-реакции — но формат 16:9 для блога.
openability_rules: Первый кадр (cover panel) = pattern interrupt: провокация + узнаваемая боль
Крупный hook-текст с розовым/жёлтым highlight на ключевом слове
Минимум 1 fake UI screenshot (Wordstat, отзыв, Telegram, analytics) — «сделал человек»
1–2 мем-реакции (разные форматы, не повторять Drake везде)
Не выглядеть как корпоративный баннер или stock photo
visual_motifs: torn paper strips with pink/black edges
pink sticky notes with marker handwriting
highlighter pink brush stroke behind 1-2 Cyrillic words
phone screenshot UI frames (Telegram chat, Yandex Wordstat, review stars)
meme reaction cutouts with rough white outline
cover_panel_prompt_block: 16:9 hook collage panel: blog host cutout (reference face, agent-chosen outfit), layered fake screenshots (Wordstat keys, zero reads analytics, 5-star review snippet or Telegram «где трафик?»), torn paper + tape + pink sticky note, 1-2 different meme reaction faces, huge Cyrillic hook headline with pink highlight on key word, handwritten arrow, DIY human-made zine aesthetic NOT corporate ad
inline_human_touch: Add subtle human-made layer: small sticky note, tape corner, or mini screenshot inset — still readable utility UI/diagram underneath
global_negative: vertical carousel 9:16, instagram story layout, corporate stock banner, clean minimal SaaS only, English text, watermark, same meme repeated 4 times, polished ad look
